channel.title: OpenAI — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by OpenAI (oai).

item.title: CVE-2026-11326 · 6 MEDIUM
item.description: OpenAI Atlas before 1.2025.288.15 exposed privileged browser APIs to web content on *.openai.com origins. A cross-site scripting vulnerability in forum.openai.com could be used to access these functions, allowing access to browser history information…
